investigationAnswers.eightFiftyInterpretation: NOT mapped to discount_pct on v24 (0/3 runs). Value 8,50 visible in Desc.(%) column between 16,60€ and 39,49€ but GPT misreads gross_unit_price instead (21 / 20.2 / 17.72). Historical v23 sometimes read 17,50 (Prosciutto neighbour) as unit_price.
investigationAnswers.whyProsciuttoSucceedsVentricinaFails: v24 prompt hardening added a full Prosciutto worked example (17,50) but only a format line for 8,50→8.5 without a Ventricina row. Prosciutto discount (17.50) exceeds gross (10.30) — unambiguous as %. Ventricina discount (8.50) is smaller than gross (16.60) and resembles a euro magnitude; GPT defaults to gross-column misread when discount_pct stays null.

matches: ruleB: disc=8.5 + unit=8.5 bleed → 15.19/39.49 (binder would fix if discount extracted)

failureMechanism.classification: GPT Pass C column mis-identification — discount omission + gross misread
failureMechanism.amplifiedBy: bindMonetaryColumns gross-without-discount path (total = qty × wrong gross)

v23ToV24Shift.v23Pattern: BLEED 17.50 (Prosciutto Desc magnitude) or MISSING gross path
v23ToV24Shift.interpretation: Prosciutto fix reduced neighbour bleed but Ventricina still lacks row-specific prompt anchor; failure mode shifted to gross OCR/column drift

recommendedActions.action: Add full Emporio Ventricina negative example: Qtd 2,60, Preço Unit 16,30€, Desc.(%) 8,50, Preço Total 39,49€ → discount_pct 8.5
Include Desc.(%) header in Pass C crop (same fix benefits all Emporio rows)
No change needed — Rule B already corrects 8.5 bleed when discount_pct present
